layout_patterns.global: Generous whitespace, asymmetric layouts favored over perfectly centered. 'Swiss Brutalist' aesthetic. Use grids heavily. Content is king.
layout_patterns.header: Sticky header (z-50), crystal glassmorphism or solid bg. Logo left, page links center, 'Book a call' button and theme toggle right. MUST have `data-testid` on links.
layout_patterns.footer: Large padding (py-24), grid layout for sitemap, contact email, social placeholders. Bottom copyright line.
layout_patterns.hero: Typography-led. Large H1, constrained max-width for text, adjacent to a technical visual (terminal window or architecture snippet).
layout_patterns.bento_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. Span 8 for primary feature, span 4 for secondary. Gap-8 to gap-12.

component_patterns.buttons: Minimalist. rounded-sm. Primary: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-accent_hover. Secondary: border border-border bg-transparent hover:bg-surface. Include hover translate or subtle glow.
component_patterns.cards: Flat surfaces (no heavy drop shadows). 1px border. rounded-sm. On hover: slight border color change and subtle -translate-y-1.
component_patterns.code_blocks: Terminal-style header (3 dots), monospace font, dark background even in light mode for code syntax. Syntax highlighting in muted colors (blues, greens, grays).
component_patterns.form: Shadcn UI forms. Sharp corners (rounded-sm). Clear focus states (ring-accent). Dummy submit with sonner toast on success.
component_patterns.nav: Desktop: visible links (not hamburger). Mobile: hamburger menu. Active link state should be clear (e.g., text-accent or underline).

motion_patterns.entrance: Staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0) on scroll using `whileInView`. Keep duration short (0.4s) to feel snappy.
motion_patterns.interactions: Hover states on all clickable elements. Button scale on tap (scale: 0.98).

sections: Service Details (AI Agents, RAG, Chatbots, Workflow) with terminal/architecture snippets
Domain Grid (Logistics, Real Estate, Retail, Manufacturing, Healthcare, Legal, 3D/Arch) with specific use cases
2-3 Case Study Cards (Marked TODO with placeholder content)
Stack Showcase (LLMs, Vector DBs, Orchestration, Deployment)

media.strategy: Prefer code snippets, terminal visuals, and abstract geometric or architecture patterns over stock photos. No robots. No brains.

images.description: Minimalist architecture, useful for About page or Hero background texture.
Server rack, useful for Technology page.
Shipping containers aerial, useful for Logistics industry card.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Avoid fully transparent backgrounds for overlays.
accessibility.forms: Inputs must have associated labels. Focus rings must be visible.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono via Google Fonts.
Install libraries: framer-motion, lucide-react, sonner, next-themes.
Configure Tailwind CSS to use the specified custom colors and fonts.
Build the 8 requested pages: Home, About, Services, Industries, Process, Work, Technology, Contact.
Implement light/dark mode toggle using next-themes.

For the Technology and Services pages, build custom 'Terminal' or 'Architecture' block components that display faux code or JSON using standard HTML/CSS + Tailwind. DO NOT use placeholder images for this.
Implement the Work case study placeholders with clear 'TODO' markings as requested.
Do NOT use consumer SaaS aesthetics (no purple-blue gradients, no floating 3D blobs).
Keep standard Shadcn components for forms, but style them with sharp edges and muted blue accents.
Ensure the contact form uses 'sonner' for the success toast.
Add 'data-testid' to all links, buttons, and form elements.
Make sure header is sticky with proper backdrop blur and contrast.
Do not use `App { text-align: center }`. Maintain left alignment for content.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetic. Create distinctive, serious B2B engineering frontend.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
DO NOT use universal transition (`transition: all`).
DO NOT apply global text-align center.
DO NOT use emoji characters for icons. Use lucide-react.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and 1px borders.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
